error_signature: workflow freezes indefinitely after several loop iterations
title: Workflow freezing due to memory accumulation in aggregate node
symptom: The workflow freezes indefinitely after processing several loop iterations without any error message.
applies_when: Using an aggregate node in a loop
Processing multiple items from an API
root_cause: The aggregate node accumulates all items from each loop iteration, leading to increased memory usage. Eventually, this causes the workflow to stall as it runs out of available memory to continue processing.
fix_steps: Refactor the workflow to use sub-workflows
Replace the aggregate node with an Execute Workflow node for each facility
Ensure each sub-workflow processes and returns only a summary of the data
agent_instruction: Refactor the workflow to use sub-workflows to prevent memory accumulation.
